sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18338" key="a)fila/gaqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφῐλ-άγᾰθος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰγ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n18338.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">notloving the good,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg016.perseus-grc1:3:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">2 Ep.Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
